## Instructor & Pydantic

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<ExpandableSection title="Why Instructor is Powerful" icon="⚡">

- Automatic schema generation from Pydantic models
- Built-in validation with automatic retry on failure
- Streaming support for partial objects
- Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, and other providers
- Type safety throughout your pipeline

</ExpandableSection>
